People

3structured records

person

Aaron Keener

A first-wave Division Agent who went rogue and became the central target of the Warlords of New York manhunt.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Gordon Amherst

The virologist identified by the Division as the creator of Green Poison.

not applicablesource reviewed

person

Vitaly Tchernenko

A Russian virologist pursued by multiple factions because his expertise could support mass production of a broad-spectrum antiviral.

not applicablesource reviewed
